summary: Tested all GDPR cookie consent features: banner appearance, Accept/Reject All, Manage Preferences modal, toggles, Save Preferences, close via X/backdrop, banner persistence after consent, footer Cookie Settings button, and German language text. Fixed a bug where German text was not shown in cookie components.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: LanguageContext.js exported `lang` but CookieBanner, CookieSettingsModal, and Footer all destructured `language` — so `isDE` was always false and German text never rendered. Fixed by adding `language: lang` alias to the context provider value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cookie consent features fully verified. Banner appears after ~6s total (preloader + 2800ms delay). Accept All/Reject All/Save Preferences all save correct localStorage values. X button, backdrop click, and in-modal buttons all work. Banner does not reappear after consent. Footer Cookie Settings opens modal even after consent. German text (DE language) now works correctly after fix to LanguageContext.js.

test_results.T9_save_preferences: PASS - saves custom choices and closes modal
test_results.T16_german_language_text: PASS after fix - banner, modal, footer all show German when DE language active

rca_of_fixed_bug: LanguageContext.js Provider value used key `lang` but CookieBanner/CookieSettingsModal/Footer destructured `language` from useLanguage(). Since `language` was undefined, `isDE = language === 'de'` was always false. Fix: added `language: lang` to the provider value object so both `lang` and `language` keys are available.
